title: hortonia angustifolia
intro: Hortonia angustifolia, also known as the Blue Ridge arrowhead, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Hortonia angustifolia can be prepared as a tea or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
